hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); cmd=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''); print('[hint] run /review before merging') if 'gh pr create' in cmd else None" 2>/dev/null; exit 0

INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null); CWD=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('cwd','.'))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '(^|[[:space:]&;|])git[[:space:]]+commit'; then branch=$(git -C "${CWD:-.}" branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [ "$branch" = 'main' ] && [ -z "$CLAUDE_ALLOW_MAIN_COMMIT" ]; then echo '[blocked] Direct commit to main is blocked. Create a feature branch, or re-run with CLAUDE_ALLOW_MAIN_COMMIT=1 for an intentional backlog-sync / docs-only commit.' >&2; exit 2; fi; fi; exit 0

python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); fp=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); exit(1 if '.env' in fp and not fp.endswith('.env.example') else 0)" || (echo '[blocked] .env edit rejected - edit manually if intentional' && exit 2)

python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); fp=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); exit(1 if any(fp.endswith(lf) for lf in ['pnpm-lock.yaml','package-lock.json','yarn.lock']) else 0)" || (echo '[blocked] lock file edit rejected - run pnpm install to regenerate' && exit 2)

python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); fp=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); exit(1 if 'apps/mobile/ios/' in fp and not any(fp.endswith(x) for x in ('Info.plist','entitlements','CarelogWatch')) else 0)" || (echo '[blocked] ios/ edit rejected - use expo prebuild to regenerate native projects' && exit 2)

python3 -c "
import sys,json,re
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
fp=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path','')
content=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('content','')
if 'supabaseAdmin' in content and not any(p in fp for p in ['/server/','/app/api/','/supabase/']):
    print(f'[warn] supabaseAdmin used outside server//app/api/ in {fp} - verify this is intentional')
" 2>/dev/null || true

CWD=$(python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('cwd','.'))" 2>/dev/null || echo .); branch=$(git -C "${CWD:-.}" branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [ "$branch" = 'main' ]; then printf '{"systemMessage": "[warn] Editing on main branch — consider a feature branch"}'; fi; exit 0

python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); fp=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); exit(0 if ('apps/web' in fp and fp.endswith(('.ts','.tsx'))) else 1)" 2>/dev/null && cd apps/web && output=$(npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1); if [ -n "$output" ]; then echo "[tsc] $output" | head -20; fi

python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); fp=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); exit(0 if ('apps/web' in fp and fp.endswith(('.ts','.tsx','.js','.jsx'))) else 1)" 2>/dev/null && cd apps/web && output=$(npx eslint --cache --quiet . 2>&1 | head -15); if [ -n "$output" ]; then echo "[eslint] $output"; fi

python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); fp=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); print(fp) if fp and any(fp.endswith(e) for e in ['.ts','.tsx','.js','.jsx']) else None" 2>/dev/null | xargs -I{} npx prettier --write {} 2>/dev/null || true

python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); fp=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); exit(0 if 'apps/mobile' in fp and fp.endswith(('.ts','.tsx')) else 1)" 2>/dev/null && cd /Users/bradygrapentine/projects/carelog/apps/mobile && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -10 || true

python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); fp=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); exit(0 if any(k in fp.lower() for k in ['auth','rls','migration','policy','supabase/tests']) else 1)" 2>/dev/null && echo '[pgTAP] Auth/RLS file changed - running supabase test db...' && cd /Users/bradygrapentine/projects/carelog && { output=$(supabase test db 2>&1); ec=$?; echo "$output" | tail -20; [ $ec -ne 0 ] && echo '[hint] pgTAP failing - invoke /ollama to dispatch a fix task, or run `supabase test db` manually to iterate'; } || true
